arts.ttl: BREAKING Arsenal suffer Gabriel Magalhaes injury blow as Mikel Arteta reveals issue
arts.sum: Gabriel Magalhaes was forced off late with injury in Arsenal's dominant 5-1 Champions League win over Sporting CP on Tuesday night, Mikel Arteta has confirmed. Speaking after the match, Arteta explained the decision to withdraw Gabriel, who scored Arsenal's third goal of the night.

arts.ttl: 3 Arsenal talking points from exceptional European victory over Sporting CP
arts.sum: Arsenal produced their most impressive Champions League performance of the season on Tuesday evening as they hammered reigning Portuguese champions Sporting CP.

arts.ttl: Arsenal star Gabriel mocks Man Utd transfer target during Champions League heroics
arts.sum: Arsenal went up against one of their top transfer targets in the form of Viktor Gyokeres in the Champions League on Tuesday night - and it was the Gunners who came out on top

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta handed Arsenal January transfer wildcard as Isak and Gyokeres alternative emerges - Matty Hewitt
arts.sum: According to The Telegraph, Brighton will make £60million-rated striker Evan Ferguson available for loan in January having fallen down the pecking order at the Amex Stadium. Arteta's side chose not to bring in a striker during the recent summer window, having been repeatedly linked with a move for Newcastle United forward Alexander Isak.

arts.ttl: Sporting Lisbon 1-5 Arsenal PLAYER RATINGS: Which Gunners star put in a complete display? Who looked off the pace in midfield? Whose calming presence laid the foundations for a thumping win?
arts.sum: ISAAN KHAN: The Gunners travelled to Lisbon on the back of a 3-0 win over Nottingham Forest in the Premier League that seemed to a herald an end to Mikel Arteta's side's poor run.

arts.ttl: Arsenal make Mikel Arteta proud after smashing Sporting in Champions League
arts.sum: Sporting 1-5 Arsenal: Goals from Gabriel Martinelli, Kai Havertz, Gabriel Magalhaes, Bukayo Saka and Leandro Trossard got their continental campaign back on track in style

arts.ttl: Sporting CP 1-5 Arsenal: Player ratings as Gunners thrash Portuguese giants
arts.sum: Player ratings and match reaction from Arsenal's Champions League encounter with reigning Portuguese champions Sporting CP.

arts.ttl: Sporting Lisbon 1-5 Arsenal: Mikel Arteta's side get back to winning ways in Europe as hosts fall to heavy defeat in first Champions League match without Ruben Amorim
arts.sum: DOMINIC KING AT ESTADIO JOSE ALVALADE: Plenty of goals? Check. Confidence restored? Check again. A performance to make rivals cast anxious glance Yes, that too.

arts.ttl: Arsenal make Mikel Arteta proud after smashing Sporting Lisbon
arts.sum: Goals from Gabriel Martinelli, Kai Havertz, Gabriel Magalhaes, Bukayo Saka and Leandro Trossard got their continental campaign back on track in style.

arts.ttl: 'Worth the wait': BBC pundit blown away by 'pace and precision' of Arsenal player who didn't score tonight
arts.sum: Arsenal made it two wins and eight goals from their last two games as they ran out 5-1 winners over Sporting CP in the Champions...
